David's distillation to 11 qualities from Psalm 15
Holech Tamim (walk in perfectness) - Abraham
Poel Tzedek (does righteousness) - Abba Chilkiyahu
Doveir Emet Bilvavo (speaks truth in heart) - Rav Safra
Lo Ragal Al Leshono (no deceit on tongue) - Jacob Avinu
Lo Asah L'Reihu Ra'ah (does not harm neighbor) - fair competition
Cherpa Lo Nasa (does not tolerate embarrassment) - family honor
Nivzeh B'Einav Nimas (despises the contemptible) - Chizkiyahu HaMelech
V'es Yirei Hashem Yichabed (honors those who fear God) - Yehoshaphat
Nishba L'Hara V'Lo Yamir (swears to hurt himself and keeps oath) - Rabbi Yochanan
Kaspo Lo Natan Beneshech (no usury) - prohibition and habit formation
Shochad (bribery) and recusal of judges - Rabbi Yishmael ben Yosi
Rabbi Gamliel weeping at psalm ending
Reduction to any one of eleven by conjecture

Gemilut Chasadim (acts of loving kindness)

Rav Nachman bar Yitzchak's interpretation of Dirshuni
Habakkuk's principle: Tzaddik Be'Emunato Yichyeh (righteous lives by faith)
